scripts.test:ci:mock: npm run test:it:all && npm run test:e2e:ci:mock && npm run validate:all && npm run diff:check
scripts.test:it:all: npm run test:it:amadeus-templates && npm run test:it:promote-skill && npm run test:it:llm-runner-options:real-command && npm run test:it:llm-provider-options:mock-real
scripts.test:e2e:ci:mock: npm run test:e2e:initial:all:mock && npm run test:e2e:rerun:all:mock
scripts.test:e2e:initial:all:mock: npm run test:e2e:steering:initial:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-init:initial:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-ideation:initial:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-inception:initial:mock
scripts.test:e2e:rerun:all:mock: npm run test:e2e:steering:rerun:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-init:rerun:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-ideation:rerun:mock && npm run test:e2e:intent-inception:rerun:mock
scripts.test:e2e:ci:real: npm run test:e2e:initial:all:real && npm run test:e2e:rerun:all:real
scripts.test:e2e:initial:all:real: npm run test:e2e:steering:initial:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-init:initial:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-ideation:initial:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-inception:initial:real
scripts.test:e2e:rerun:all:real: npm run test:e2e:steering:rerun:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-init:rerun:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-ideation:rerun:real && npm run test:e2e:intent-inception:rerun:real
scripts.validate:intents: for state in .amadeus/intents/*/state.json; do intent_dir=${state%/state.json}; intent=${intent_dir##*/}; ruby .agents/skills/amadeus-intent-validator/validator/IntentValidator.rb . "$intent"; done
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate && npm run validate:intents
